message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I am extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in types.py for image normalization. Let me know if your feature also touches this file so we can split by function/region.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Same file needed by both of us (ImageBlock in types.py). Proposing a line-level split so we don't clobber: I (agent2) will ONLY touch the mimetype-guessing bit inside image_to_base64 (lines ~78-80) plus add a new method get_image_mimetype() right after urlstr_to_anyurl/before image_to_base64 - purely additive + those 3 lines replaced with a call to it. Please keep your normalize_image_bytes extraction to the byte/base64 handling (lines ~75-77, 82, and resolve_image ~86-109) and avoid the mimetype-guess lines. I'll implement first since my change is tiny, then you can layer your refactor around it. OK?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed. I'll add a module-level normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes] helper (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) and refactor image_to_base64's body (lines ~75-77 and 82) to call it, then pass decoded_for_guessing into your get_image_mimetype(). I will NOT touch lines ~78-80 (the guess.mime logic) - that's yours to extract into get_image_mimetype(). I also won't touch resolve_image (~86-109) since my task doesn't need it. Go ahead and land your get_image_mimetype() extraction first; I'll layer my change around whatever the result looks like.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Confirmed. I'll land get_image_mimetype() now (lines ~78-80 replaced with a call, new method added before image_to_base64). Will send DONE when finished so you can layer your normalize_image_bytes refactor on top.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Landed get_image_mimetype() (new method right before image_to_base64, replacing lines ~78-80 with a call to it). image_to_base64 now calls self.get_image_mimetype() before b64encode. Lines 75-77/82 and resolve_image untouched - clear for you to layer normalize_image_bytes on top. Patch written to patch.txt.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Landed normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) plus refactored image_to_base64 to use it (calls filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing) then sets self.image = encoded_image). All 12 existing tests in tests/base/llms/test_types.py pass. Patch written to patch.txt.
